---
title: "The Rev. Dr. John Mason Neale"
---

## The Rev. Dr. John Mason Neale

**Dates:** (1818-1866)

### Description

hymnwriter, Warden of Sackville College

### Biography

He married (1842) Sarah Norman Webster (1814?-1873);  the letter (1880), was probably addressed to one of their four daughters.

### Letters

- Letter from January 10 1890
- Letter from Feb 21st  1880
- Letter from Aug 18th [1870]
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from Febry 3d [1864]
- Letter from Aug. 21st, 1858
- Letter from Febry 13th [1854]
- Letter from Jany 16th [1854]
- Letter from Decr 31st [1853]
- Letter from Oct 19th [1852]
- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
